title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out with Maruzensky...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Claw machines! These are so huge with the kids
right now.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I used to play them all the time... But once I got
the hang of it, the thrill was gone!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, look over there! That plushie is mad cute!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn to see Umamusume plushies on display as
prizes for a claw machine.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I want that one so bad! Can you get it for me?
choice_data_list:
Didn't you say you were good at claw
machines?

Didn't you say you were good at claw
machines?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You just don't get it, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You just don't get it, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Having someone win it for you feels totally
different from winning it for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You got this, Trainer! I know you can do it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You got this, Trainer! I know you can do it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
